Sunroof_x95_B2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74B
Recv ID: 76B
Baudrate: 125000
Func Addr: 1C
Func Name: Pilotage capote

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "220",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 43776,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Digital Command Status": "0"
    },
    "name": "Digital Command Not Connected"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43777,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Digital Command in Failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43808,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "SunRoof position": "0"
    },
    "name": "Electronic or Motor Failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43809,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "High Effort Position": "0"
    },
    "name": "High Effort On Mechanism"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43810,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Data Anti Pinch": "0"
    },
    "name": "Pinch Event Detection"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43840,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Initialization Failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49441,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {
      "CAN_VehicleSpeed": "0",
      "CAN_DistanceTotalizer": "0"
    },
    "name": "Lost communication with BRAKE"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49472,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {
      "CAN_GADE": "0"
    },
    "name": "Lost communication with BCM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 61441,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "ECU Input Voltage": "0"
    },
    "name": "Supply Voltage Out Of Limit"
  }
]

[
  {
    "minbytes": 22,
    "sentbytes": "2184",
    "name": "Lecture de la traçabilité du calculateur",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Jour pour traçabilité": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
